blended.narrative: Stowe is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 245 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tuesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 51°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
